name: RFPIO RFP Response Automation API
what_it_does: RFP response automation platform with REST API — using AI to automatically answer RFP, RFI, and security questionnaire questions from a content library, enabling collaboration across sales, legal, and technical teams on responses, tracking win rates, and managing the full proposal lifecycle from intake to submission.
use_cases: Automating RFP questionnaire intake and AI-powered answer population via API
Managing response content library updates and answer quality reviews programmatically
Integrating RFP opportunity data with Salesforce for pipeline visibility
Querying RFP analytics (win rates, response time, completion rates) for operations reporting
Automating stakeholder assignment notifications when RFP sections require SME input
not_for: General proposal and quote creation (use PandaDoc or Proposify for simpler proposals)
Contract lifecycle management (use Ironclad or Docusign CLM)
Customer-facing sales content delivery (use Highspot or Seismic)
best_when: An enterprise sales operations team responds to frequent RFPs, RFIs, and security questionnaires and needs AI-powered automation to reduce response time, maintain content quality, and track win rates across a large volume of proposals.
avoid_when: You respond to fewer than 10-20 RFPs/month (lower ROI), need simple sales proposals rather than formal RFP responses, or lack a content library to seed the AI answering system.

auth.notes: API key from RFPIO account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for RFP status changes and completion events. Salesforce, HubSpot, and Slack native integrations. No OAuth2 for primary API access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing per user/year; contact sales
pricing.notes: Folsom, CA-based company. Founded 2015. Raised $50M+. Acquired by Responsive (2022) — now operates as RFPIO brand under Responsive umbrella. AI Smart Answer Engine uses historical responses for automated population. Content management with version control and owner assignments. 250+ integrations. Largest RFP automation platform by market share. Strong in cybersecurity, technology, and financial services.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for RFPs, content library, responses, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good API documentation. AI auto-answering is async — questions processed in background. Content library seeding required before AI provides quality answers. Webhook for status changes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: RFP reads fully idempotent. Content reads idempotent. Response reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: AI answering quality depends on content library completeness — ramp-up period required
Responsive acquisition — API roadmap may shift post-acquisition
RFP document parsing (Word, Excel, PDF) is async — processing time varies
SME assignment workflow requires user management configuration
Annual contract — significant investment before API integration value

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. RFP responses often contain proprietary pricing and security information — restrict access strictly. Content library with competitive information requires access control. Enterprise security questionnaire responses are particularly sensitive.
